- Column `ENTSCHEIDUNG` was added and populated per HAUS:
  - HAUS with fewer than 3 EQUNR → `ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'KSA'`
  - Otherwise → `ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'EVU'`

structured_content.response:
The process for `process_rule_id = 'J09C'` has been executed end-to-end:

- Rows for tours starting with `J09C` were copied into `J09C_temp`.
- Column `ENTSCHEIDUNG` was added and populated per HAUS:
  - HAUS with fewer than 3 EQUNR → `ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'KSA'`
  - Otherwise → `ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'EVU'`
- Data was joined with `EABLG`, then with `NET_MASTER` and `SALES_MASTER` on `EQUNR`.
- For each row, customer data was taken from `SALES_MASTER` if available; otherwise from `NET_MASTER`.
- The final dataset was exported to CSV as `J09C.csv` with the required columns and order:
  - `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`, `HAUS`, `ANLAGE`, `ME_MA_ID`, `EQUNR`, `HOUSE_NUM1`, `ENTSCHEIDUNG`,  
    `TITLE`, `FORENAME`, `SURNAME`, `STREET`, `STREETNO`, `POST_CODE1`, `CITY1`, `CITY2`, `EMAIL`
  - File path:  
    `sessions/gpt-5.1/processadaptation_base_rule_processadaptationmethod_generate_bpmn_tour_J09C_seed_42/J09C.csv`
- An email with the CSV attached was prepared for `meter.readings@evu.com`.
- Temporary tables `J09C_temp`, `J09C_working`, and `J09C_final` were deleted.

If you’d like, I can also generate a brief summary of the resulting dataset (row counts, sample rows, etc.).

kwargs.content:
The process with `process_rule_id = 'J09C'` has been executed successfully end-to-end. Summary of what was done:

- Filtered all tours starting with `J09C` into a temporary table `J09C_temp`.
- Added column `ENTSCHEIDUNG` per `HAUS`:
  - Fewer than 3 `EQUNR` → `ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'KSA'`
  - Otherwise → `ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'EVU'`
- Joined with `EABLG`, then with `NET_MASTER` and `SALES_MASTER` on `EQUNR`.
- Chose customer data from `SALES_MASTER` when present; otherwise from `NET_MASTER`.
- Exported the final dataset to CSV as `J09C.csv` with columns:

  `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`, `HAUS`, `ANLAGE`, `ME_MA_ID`, `EQUNR`, `HOUSE_NUM1`, `ENTSCHEIDUNG`,  
  `TITLE`, `FORENAME`, `SURNAME`, `STREET`, `STREETNO`, `POST_CODE1`, `CITY1`, `CITY2`, `EMAIL`

- CSV file path:  
  `sessions/gpt-5.1/processadaptation_base_rule_processadaptationmethod_generate_bpmn_tour_J09C_seed_42/J09C.csv`
- Prepared an email with the CSV attached to `meter.readings@evu.com`.
- Cleaned up temporary tables: `J09C_temp`, `J09C_working`, `J09C_final`.

Tell me if you want details such as row counts or a preview of the exported data.
